close_reason: Already fixed: inventory closures now use imported Arc
description:
src/lib.rs:401, 408-410 'std::sync::Arc::new(b) as std::sync::Arc<dyn secretx_core::SecretStore>' and similar. Repeated full path cost in a single closure body.

Suggested rewrite: add 'use std::sync::Arc;' at the top of the file (the crate already has a 'use' block at line 70), then write:
  Arc::new(b) as Arc<dyn secretx_core::SecretStore>

Engineering basis: identical width in the type annotation, less width in the constructor call, easier to grep for 'Arc::new'. Consistent with most of the rest of the codebase (already imports SecretError, SecretStore, etc. by short name).
title: Fully-qualified std::sync::Arc instead of 'use std::sync::Arc'
